home.title: DilUp — Learn English online with a tutor who fits you
home.description: DilUp is Azerbaijan's online language platform. Find your perfect English tutor, set your budget, and start speaking from the very first lesson.

becomeTutor.title: Become a tutor on DilUp — set your own rate
becomeTutor.description: Teach English on DilUp. Set your own price, choose your hours, and earn on your terms with secure payments.

tutorOnboarding.title: Tutor application
tutorOnboarding.description: Build your DilUp tutor profile, add proof, choose availability and set your lesson price.

copy.sueHeadline: Speak English with confidence — in meetings, interviews, and everyday life.
copy.neaHeadline: Build real confidence speaking English, step by step, at your pace.
copy.andrewHeadline: IELTS and business English coaching that gets real results.

certificates.TEFL: Teaching English as a Foreign Language

sue-l.bio: Hi, I'm Sue! Native English speaker with 20+ years in business. I'll help you speak naturally, sound professional, and stop translating in your head.
sue-l.about: Hey there! I'm Sue, a native English speaker from the US with an MBA and 20+ years of experience in healthcare marketing. I specialize in business English, job interview prep, and everyday conversation. My lessons are relaxed but focused — we'll work on real situations you actually face, not just textbook dialogues. Let's get you talking with confidence!
sue-l.highlight: Great for conversation practice — strong focus on vocabulary, listening, and real-life English.
sue-l.reviewSummary: Students love how Sue tailors every lesson to their goals. She explains things clearly, corrects mistakes on the spot, and keeps lessons fun and well-organized.

reviews.0: Sue is an amazing tutor! Super professional and always has great strategies to help you improve.
reviews.1: Honestly one of the best teachers I've had — patient, encouraging, and genuinely cares about your progress.
reviews.2: Lessons are well-structured, easy to follow, and never boring.
reviews.3: I always learn something new, and the feedback after each lesson is super helpful.

nea-p.bio: Hi, I'm Nea from Finland! I help students speak more naturally with friendly corrections, clear goals, and lots of speaking practice.
nea-p.about: Hi! I'm Nea, a CELTA-certified English teacher from Finland. I love working with beginners and anyone who feels nervous speaking English. My lessons are relaxed and encouraging — we'll focus on what you actually need: daily conversation, travel English, or just building the confidence to speak without overthinking.
nea-p.highlight: Great match if you want patient, judgment-free speaking practice.
nea-p.reviewSummary: Students describe Nea as warm, patient, and incredibly easy to talk to. A great pick if you want to build everyday confidence.

reviews.0: Nea is so kind and easy to talk to — never makes you feel embarrassed about mistakes.
reviews.1: I finally feel comfortable speaking English at work, thanks to Nea!

andrew-s.bio: Expert IELTS and business English coaching — speaking, writing, and professional communication. Book a trial and let's build your plan.
andrew-s.about: I'm Andrew, a DELTA-qualified English teacher from the UK. My lessons are direct, practical, and focused on measurable progress — perfect if you're preparing for IELTS, want sharper business writing, or need to sound more confident in meetings and interviews.
andrew-s.highlight: Strong choice for IELTS speaking and writing practice.
andrew-s.reviewSummary: Students praise Andrew's direct feedback, smart exam strategies, and well-organized lessons.

reviews.0: Andrew's IELTS feedback is incredibly clear and actually useful.
reviews.1: Great structure, and my business vocabulary has improved so much.

tutorProfile.freeTrials: You still have 2 free tutor trials.

howItWorks.title: How <mark>DilUp</mark> works
howItWorks.step1Text: Filter by price, availability and specialty. Browse profiles and intro videos.
howItWorks.step2Text: Talk to your tutor in a live video lesson. No software to install.
howItWorks.step3Text: Keep your schedule, do the homework and see real results.

guarantee.title: A tutor match, guaranteed
guarantee.text: If your first lesson isn't the right fit, get a free trial with another tutor. No risk at all.

becomeTutor.title: Become a tutor, set your own rate
becomeTutor.text: Teach whenever and wherever you want. You're in control of your earnings — you set the price.

footer.tagline: DilUp connects learners with tutors who fit their goals, budget and schedule through live, one-to-one lessons.

onboarding.introText: Share your goal, level and weekly availability so we can shape the right tutor shortlist.

visual.pathText: Goals, schedule and tutor fit in one path

signup.title: Almost there. See {subject} tutors matched to you.
signup.text: Create a free account to keep your answers, unlock the shortlist and book a trial lesson.
signup.legal: By continuing, you agree to DilUp terms and privacy policy.

actions.missing: Complete the required fields to continue.

about.speaks: Add at least one language and level.

photo.required: Add a profile photo to continue.

start.title: Build your DilUp profile in a clear step-by-step flow.
start.text: This flow helps you create a profile students can trust: who you are, what you teach, how you teach and when you are available.

about.title: About
about.text: Start creating your public tutor profile. Your progress will be automatically saved as you complete each section. You can return at any time to finish your registration.

photo.title: Profile photo
photo.text: Choose a photo that will help learners get to know you.

certification.title: Teaching certification
certification.text: Do you have teaching certificates? If so, describe them to enhance your profile credibility and get more students.

education.title: Education
education.text: Add the higher education you have finished or are currently completing.

description.title: Write the profile in your own voice.
description.text: Your text should explain your teaching style, experience and what a student can expect from the first lesson.

video.title: Show your teaching energy with a short video.
video.text: Students want to hear you before choosing. A natural 30-60 second video is enough.

availability.title: Choose when you can teach.
availability.text: Accurate availability means fewer cancellations and easier bookings.

price.title: Set your rate for a 50-minute lesson.
price.text: You choose the price. DilUp is pay-per-lesson, with no subscription package selling.

profile.title: Profile
profile.text: We collect your name, language, specialties and experience.

proof.title: Trust
proof.text: Photo, certificates and education make your profile more credible.

video.title: Introduction
video.text: Video, schedule and price directly affect the student's decision.

hints.headline: For example: Structured English lessons for speaking confidence.
hints.intro: Clearly explain who you teach and how the first lesson will work.

subjectLevelModal.title: What's your language level for the subject you teach?
subjectLevelModal.text: Please provide your level for the language you teach in order to continue with your application.

sampleAlt.0: Tutor portrait example with clear face
sampleAlt.2: Tutor photo example with calm background
sampleAlt.3: Tutor portrait example with natural light

rules.centered: You should be centered and upright.
rules.visible: Your face and eyes should be visible.
rules.light: Use natural light and a calm background.
rules.plain: Avoid logos, heavy filters and group photos.
rules.current: Choose a real photo that reflects how you look now.
rules.solo: You should be the only person in the photo.

errors.type: Upload a JPG or PNG image.
errors.size: The photo must be 5MB or smaller.
errors.unauthorized: Log in as a tutor before uploading your profile photo.
errors.generic: We could not upload the photo. Try again.

certification.authentic: Only authentic documents will be accepted. False information can delay approval or suspend your tutor account.
certification.badgeText: Upload your certificate to boost your credibility. Our team will review it and add a verified badge to your profile.
certification.exactName: Write the name exactly as it appears on your certificate.
certification.format: JPG or PNG format; maximum size of 20MB.
certification.helper: Certificate #{number} will be considered during profile review.
certification.noCertificateText: Do you plan on getting certified? You can add your teaching certification later.
certification.none: I don’t have a teaching certificate
certification.notListed: My certificate is not on the list
certification.uploadText: Our team will manually review your submission.

errors.completeEntry: Complete the certificate you started or remove this block.
errors.chooseOrSkip: To proceed, add your teaching certification or tick the box “I don’t have a teaching certificate.” You can always add your certification later.
errors.subject: Choose a subject for this certificate.
errors.years: Choose both start and end years.
errors.yearRange: End year cannot be earlier than start year.
errors.type: Upload a JPG or PNG document.
errors.size: Certificate file must be 20MB or smaller.
errors.unauthorized: Log in with your tutor account to upload certificates.
errors.generic: We could not upload the certificate. Try again.

education.none: I don’t have a higher education degree
education.noneHint: You can skip this section for now and add education details after profile review.
education.entryHint: Completed education helps students understand your academic background.
education.optionalHint: No higher education to add? Leave this section empty and continue.
education.badgeText: Add a diploma document so our review team can verify it and show a trust badge on your profile. Documents are not kept after review is complete.
education.format: JPG or PNG format; maximum size of 20MB.

errors.completeEntry: Complete the education entry you started or remove this block.
errors.chooseOrSkip: To proceed, add your higher education or tick the box “I don’t have a higher education degree.” You can always add education later.
errors.degree: Enter the degree or program name.
errors.years: Choose both start and end years.
errors.yearRange: End year cannot be earlier than start year.
errors.fileType: Upload a JPG or PNG diploma file.
errors.fileSize: Diploma file must be 20MB or smaller.

degreeTypes.subject: Degree in the subject you teach

placeholders.degree: E.g. Bachelor’s degree in the English Language
placeholders.field: E.g. Teaching English as a Foreign Language

description.guidance: This info will go on your public profile. Write it in the language you’ll be teaching and make sure to follow our <guidelines>profile quality notes</guidelines> before continuing.

intro.title: Introduce yourself
intro.text: Show potential students who you are. Share your teaching experience, your passion for education, and briefly mention your interests or hobbies.
intro.placeholder: Hello, my name is... and I’m from...
intro.hint: Don’t include your last name or present your information in a CV format.

experience.title: Teaching experience
experience.text: Provide a detailed description of your relevant teaching experience. Include certifications, teaching methodology, education, and subject expertise.
experience.placeholder: I have 5 years of teaching experience. My classes are...

motivation.title: Motivate potential students
motivation.text: Encourage students to book their first lesson. Highlight the benefits of learning with you.
motivation.placeholder: Book a lesson with me so we can discuss your goals and how I can help you reach them...
motivation.hint: Do not include information about free trial lessons, discounts, or personal contact details.

headline.title: Write a catchy headline
headline.text: Your headline is the first thing students see about you. Make it attention-grabbing, mention your teaching language, and encourage students to read your full description.
headline.placeholder: Certified English tutor with 5 years of experience

errors.minimum: Write at least {count} characters across your profile text before continuing.
errors.tooLong: Ensure this value has at most {max} characters (it has {count}).
errors.continueRequired: Press Continue on each description section before saving.
errors.reviewSections: Review the highlighted section before saving.
errors.lastName: Remove your last name so your public profile stays privacy-safe.
errors.contact: Remove links, email addresses, phone numbers, or social handles.
errors.offers: Remove promises about free lessons, discounts, or promotions.

assist.title: Writing helper
assist.text: Create an editable student-facing invitation from your teaching details.
assist.added: Message added. Adjust it until it sounds like you.
assist.notice: This draft is generated from your DilUp profile details. You can edit the text and switch tone before adding it.

templates.base: Book a lesson with me and we will turn your {subject} goals into clear weekly progress. You will practice useful phrases, receive kind corrections, and leave each class knowing exactly what to work on next.
templates.formal: I would be glad to help you improve your {subject} through structured, practical lessons. Together, we will define your goals, strengthen your confidence, and build steady progress with clear feedback after every class.
templates.friendly: Let’s make {subject} feel easier and more natural. In our lessons, we will talk about real topics, fix mistakes kindly, and build a plan that keeps you moving forward each week.
templates.short: Ready to improve your {subject}? We will set clear goals, practice real situations, and build your confidence step by step.

video.permissionError: Allow camera and microphone access to test recording.
video.recordingError: Recording could not start. Check your browser permissions and try again.
video.minimumError: Your video should be between 30 seconds and 2 minutes long.
video.horizontalTitle: Add a horizontal video of up to 2 minutes
video.horizontalText: Introduce yourself to students in the same language as your written description. If you teach a different language, include a short sample.
video.linkTitle: Or paste a link to your video
video.linkHelp: Learn how to upload videos to YouTube or Vimeo.
video.thumbnailText: Don’t worry if you don’t have a thumbnail ready, we’ll use the preview above.
video.linkPrompt: Have a pre-recorded video on YouTube or Vimeo?
video.requirementsText: Make sure your video meets the requirements to get approved.

doRules.length: Your video should be between 30 seconds and 2 minutes long
doRules.horizontal: Record in horizontal mode and at eye level
doRules.lighting: Use good lighting and a neutral background
doRules.stable: Use a stable surface so that your video does not appear shaky
doRules.visible: Make sure your face and eyes are fully visible
doRules.experience: Highlight your teaching experience and relevant certification(s)
doRules.invite: Greet your students warmly and invite them to book a lesson

dontRules.contact: Include your surname or any contact details
dontRules.people: Have any other people visible in your video

rules.sound: Keep your sound clear and background quiet.
rules.promise: Say who you help and how your lessons work.
rules.invite: End by inviting the student to the first lesson.
rules.lighting: Use good lighting and a neutral background.
rules.stable: Keep the camera stable so the video does not shake.

price.label: 50-minute lesson
price.note: You can change the rate later from your profile.
price.payoutText: This example uses DilUp's 25% platform commission.

preview.title: The headline students see will appear here
preview.text: As you complete the profile text, this card becomes more realistic.
preview.note: This application is saved locally. When the backend is connected, the same data will be written to the Supabase tutor profile.

submitted.title: Your application draft is ready.
submitted.text: The flow is complete. Next we can connect it to the Supabase tutor profile and add admin review status.

review.title: Review
review.text: The team checks your profile information.

message.title: Edits
message.text: If needed, we ask for extra details.

live.title: Live
live.text: After approval, your profile becomes visible to students.

savedTutors.title: Saved tutors
savedTutors.subtitle: {count} tutor(s) saved for later.
savedTutors.emptyText: Use the heart button on tutor cards or profiles to build your shortlist.
